books.abstract: One night. One mistake. Mia never expected to wake up next to her cold, by-the-book university professor, let alone end up pregnant. Just when she's on the verge of breaking down, Professor Carter stuns her with a proposal. Next thing she knows, they're living under one roof as husband and wife.
books.author: fanqie
books.novel_audit_mark_info: {"disclaimer":{"content_label":["Language Depicting, Offering, or Requesting a Sexual Act or Sexual Imagery for Sexual Gratification","Restricted Behavior Standards"],"fictional_warnings":[],"show_in_first":false,"special_disclaimers":[],"trigger_warning":[]}}

books.abstract: Charlotte Grant leaves the hospital and learns her twin Yvonne Grant is hurt by Charles Evans. She takes Yvonne's identity to fight the mistress, her mother-in-law and Charles Evans. She protects Grant Holdings and nearly gets exposed. The sisters trap Charles Evans and send him to prison. They win justice and start a new life.
books.author: qimao

books.abstract: Diana Reed, a renowned dog trainer, is hired by Mrs. Lane to tame her rebellious son, Edward Lane Jr.—only to find he's a grown man with a troubled mind. Using her methods, Diana helps Ed Jr. regain control, sparks fly, but jealous Sophia Grant forces her departure. Three years later, Diana returns; Ed Jr. still waits.
books.author: gangganghao
books.book_name: How to Train a Bad Boy

books.abstract: Following her mother's funeral and a betrayal, Mara Cook discovers she can understand animals. Adopted by billionaire Julian Ford, she uses this gift to aid the family through crises, winning over her disabled uncle Sean and becoming their most cherished member.
books.author: mangzhong
books.novel_audit_mark_info: {"disclaimer":{"content_label":[],"fictional_warnings":[],"show_in_first":false,"special_disclaimers":[],"trigger_warning":["Depiction of Acts of Serious Violence","Minor Physical Abuse (Milder)"]}}

books.abstract: After a harsh upbringing, Evelyn Vincent returns to her wealthy family, only to find her place taken by Isabella, the adopted daughter she was swapped with at birth. Armed with resilience and a sharp mind, Evelyn navigates a hostile household, confronting her biased mother, hostile brother, and manipulative rival. She fights for her rightful place, from school conflicts to corporate battles
books.author: DramaBox
books.novel_audit_mark_info: {"disclaimer":{"content_label":["Language Depicting, Offering, or Requesting a Sexual Act or Sexual Imagery for Sexual Gratification"],"fictional_warnings":[],"show_in_first":false,"special_disclaimers":[],"trigger_warning":["Depiction of Acts of Serious Violence","Non-Consensual Sexual Act Involving Adult (Disclaimer)","Violent Death, Accident or Mutilation"]}}

books.abstract: After being mistreated and killed by her birth parents, Sophie Nightingale is awakening and requests a new father. Her unruly uncle, Uncle Richard, is forced to become her guardian. Together they rewrite the family's fate—taming playboy, exposing fake heiress, reclaiming inheritance, and rising as elite circle stars.
books.author: qimao

books.abstract: Princess Lexi woke up in the modern world as a starving girl who had been swapped at birth, unloved, and left to die. Furious, she left behind the man who had never cared for her and made the town's biggest loser her new dad. She was ready to turn trash into treasure.
books.author: yinghuokuaichuang

books.abstract: Refusing to marry for money, Tina had a one-night stand with Ben and left her toxic family. Five years later, Ben found out about Tina's son, fell in love with Tina, and protected them from Yvonne's traps. Meanwhile, Tina found out that she was actually the daughter of Yvonne's family...
books.author: yuewen
books.novel_audit_mark_info: {"disclaimer":{"content_label":["Language Depicting, Offering, or Requesting a Sexual Act or Sexual Imagery for Sexual Gratification","Restricted Behavior Standards"],"fictional_warnings":[],"show_in_first":false,"special_disclaimers":[],"trigger_warning":[]}}

books.abstract: Charlotte Evans, a modern woman, is thrust into a tragic romance novel as its doomed heroine. Forced into a scandal with Edward Lancaster, she subverts fate, forging a sibling bond. Amid palace intrigue and a love hex, they unite, survive betrayal, embrace love, and claim a happy ending.
books.author: juhaokan
books.novel_audit_mark_info: {"disclaimer":{"content_label":[],"fictional_warnings":[],"show_in_first":false,"special_disclaimers":[],"trigger_warning":["Depiction of Acts of Serious Violence","Violent Death, Accident or Mutilation"]}}

books.abstract: After losing her firefighter husband Ryan Carter and discovering she's pregnant, Emily Lane is devastated. Sorting his belongings, she finds his secret 2007 crush. Suddenly, she and her unborn child are sent back to the year they first met, into the world of the "White-haired Youth," determined to rewrite their fate.
books.author: yidiandianranyingshi

books.abstract: She was his father's adopted daughter, forbidden and desired. Silas loved Eliana with an intensity that scared them both. When she finally escaped, he was left with nothing but regret. Four years later, she's back—and he's determined to win her heart the right way.
books.author: mengxiaoK
books.novel_audit_mark_info: {"disclaimer":{"content_label":["Language Depicting, Offering, or Requesting a Sexual Act or Sexual Imagery for Sexual Gratification","Restricted Behavior Standards"],"fictional_warnings":[],"show_in_first":false,"special_disclaimers":[],"trigger_warning":[]}}

books.abstract: Awakening in the Seventies as a disgraced military wife, 21st-century medical expert Dr. May Summers transforms her life, reputation, and appearance. Her husband Jack Howard's feelings shift from resentment to love. Together, they rewrite their destinies and find lasting happiness amid change.
books.author: fanqie

books.abstract: Charlotte Summers flees an arranged marriage, accidentally hooks model Alexander Sterling, and signs a contract marriage. She fights workplace battles; he secretly shields her. When his billionaire identity emerges, she rises from pawn to queen. He declares her his redemption in a global wedding.
books.author: douduyanqing

books.abstract: Air traffic controller Grace has secretly loved elite pilot Liam for a decade, her admiration hidden behind the radar screens of the control tower. A fateful blind date unexpectedly reunites them, igniting an impulsive decision to marry. Their whirlwind union begins as a marriage of convenience but soon navigates turbulent skies.
books.author: fanqie
books.novel_audit_mark_info: {"disclaimer":{"content_label":["Language Depicting, Offering, or Requesting a Sexual Act or Sexual Imagery for Sexual Gratification"],"fictional_warnings":[],"show_in_first":true,"special_disclaimers":[],"trigger_warning":["Depiction of Acts of Serious Violence","Non-Consensual Sexual Act Involving Adult (Disclaimer)","Sexual Harassment"]}}

books.abstract: Forced into a marriage to save her adoptive father, Louise Mitchell leaves the city for the countryside, only to discover her "farmer" husband, Troy Scott, is actually a hidden billionaire. Bound by a three-month contract, their rocky start slowly transforms into trust and passion, as schemes, family conflicts, and secrets test their love.
books.author: DramaBox
books.book_name: Move to Countryside, Marry a Billionaire!

books.abstract: Innocent student Sophia Lane spends a night with cold CEO Alexander Grant and gets pregnant. They meet again at a job fair with misunderstandings. Sophia faces family pressure to marry for money. Alexander saves her, cherishes her as his wife, and loves her wholeheartedly.
books.author: huahuayedu

books.abstract: Legendary healer Celine hides her identity to save her fiancé, Korbin, and cares for him for three years. When he wakes and falls for another woman, she walks away and finds comfort in his uncle, Quentin. When Korbin learns the truth and sees his ex thriving, regret swallows him whole.
books.author: caiyuangungun

books.abstract: Evelyn's mistake? Taking money from Henry after their one-night stand. She'd loved him secretly for 8 years. Their toxic affair burned hot at night, cold by day. When Henry got engaged, Evelyn tried to leave. But he dragged her back. Now he keeps protecting her. She thinks he doesn't care. Really, he can't let her go.
books.author: huace
